diff --git a/App/Apps/W1/Shopify/app/src/Order handling/Codeunits/ShpfyCopyDocumentMgt.Codeunit.al b/App/Apps/W1/Shopify/app/src/Order handling/Codeunits/ShpfyCopyDocumentMgt.Codeunit.al
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..0a1ed8d6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/App/Apps/W1/Shopify/app/src/Order handling/Codeunits/ShpfyCopyDocumentMgt.Codeunit.al	
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+namespace Microsoft.Integration.Shopify;
+
+using Microsoft.Sales.Document;
+using Microsoft.Utilities;
+
+/// <summary>
+/// Codeunit Shpfy Copy Document Mgt. (ID 30363).
+/// Handles clearing of Shopify Order Id and Order No. when copying sales documents.
+/// </summary>
+codeunit 30363 "Shpfy Copy Document Mgt."
+{
+    /// <summary>
+    /// Event subscriber for OnAfterCopySalesDocument event.
+    /// Clears the Shopify Order Id and Shopify Order No. fields when a sales document is copied.
+    /// </summary>
+    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Copy Document Mgt.", 'OnAfterCopySalesDocument', '', false, false)]
+    local procedure OnAfterCopySalesDocument(var ToSalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
+    begin
+        // Clear Shopify Order Id and Order No. fields when copying
+        // The copied document is a new document and should not be linked to the original Shopify order
+        ToSalesHeader."Shpfy Order Id" := 0;
+        ToSalesHeader."Shpfy Order No." := '';
+        ToSalesHeader.Modify(false);
+    end;
+}

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Activity/WhseActivityRegister.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Activity/WhseActivityRegister.Codeunit.al

+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Activity/WhseActivityRegister.Codeunit.al
@@ -1589,11 +1589,15 @@ codeunit 7307 "Whse.-Activity-Register"
                 WhseAvailMgt.CalcLineReservedQtyOnInvt(
                     WhseActivLine."Source Type", WhseActivLine."Source Subtype", WhseActivLine."Source No.", WhseActivLine."Source Line No.", WhseActivLine."Source Subline No.", false, WhseItemTrackingSetup, WhseActivLine);
 
-            TotalAvailQtyBase :=
-              QtyInWhseBase -
-              QtyPickedNotShipped -
-              Abs(Item."Reserved Qty. on Inventory") +
-              LineReservedQtyBase;
+            // For picks with specific tracking/reservation, don't deduct other sources' picked quantities
+            if WhseItemTrackingSetup.TrackingRequired() and LineReservedQtyBase > 0 then
+                TotalAvailQtyBase := QtyInWhseBase - Abs(Item."Reserved Qty. on Inventory") + LineReservedQtyBase
+            else
+                TotalAvailQtyBase :=
+                  QtyInWhseBase -
+                  QtyPickedNotShipped -
+                  Abs(Item."Reserved Qty. on Inventory") +
+                  LineReservedQtyBase;
         end;
 
         exit(TotalAvailQtyBase);
